parameters.query:
WITH faces AS (
  SELECT
    af.id,
    af."personId",
    NULLIF(TRIM(p.name), '') AS person_name,
    CASE
      WHEN af."personId" IS NULL THEN 'no_person_recognized'
      WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(p.name), '') IS NULL THEN 'person_unlabeled'
      ELSE 'person_named'
    END AS state
  FROM asset_face af
  LEFT JOIN person p ON p.id = af."personId"
)

SELECT
  label,
  face_count
FROM (
  -- State counts (faces)
  SELECT
    state AS label,
    COUNT(*) AS face_count
  FROM faces
  GROUP BY state

  UNION ALL

  -- Name counts (faces per person)
  SELECT
    person_name AS label,
    COUNT(*) AS face_count
  FROM faces
  WHERE person_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY person_name

  UNION ALL

  -- ✅ Total distinct recognized people
  SELECT
    'recognized_people_total' AS label,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "personId") AS face_count
  FROM faces
  WHERE person_name IS NOT NULL
) combined
ORDER BY
  face_count DESC,
  label;

SELECT
  table_name,
  json_agg(
    json_build_object(
      'name', column_name,
      'type', data_type
    )
    ORDER BY ordinal_position
  ) AS columns
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'public'
GROUP BY table_name
ORDER BY table_name;

SELECT
  a.id,
  a."originalFileName",
  a."createdAt"         AS imported_at,
  a."fileCreatedAt",
  a."localDateTime"     AS timeline_date,
  ex."dateTimeOriginal" AS exif_original_date,
  ex."modifyDate"       AS exif_modify_date,
  ex."timeZone"         AS exif_time_zone
FROM asset a
LEFT JOIN asset_exif ex
  ON ex."assetId" = a.id
ORDER BY a."createdAt" DESC;

SELECT
  a.id,
  a."originalFileName",
  a."createdAt"         AS imported_at,
  a."localDateTime"     AS timeline_date,
  ex."dateTimeOriginal" AS exif_original_date,

  -- mismatch metrics (NULL if timeline_date is NULL)
  (a."createdAt" - a."localDateTime") AS time_difference,
  ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a."createdAt" - a."localDateTime"))) AS diff_seconds,
  ROUND(ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a."createdAt" - a."localDateTime"))) / 3600, 2)  AS diff_hours,
  ROUND(ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a."createdAt" - a."localDateTime"))) / 86400, 2) AS diff_days,

  -- helpful label
  CASE
    WHEN a."localDateTime" IS NULL THEN 'no_timeline_date'
    WHEN ex."dateTimeOriginal" IS NULL THEN 'no_exif'
    ELSE 'exif_present'
  END AS exif_status

FROM asset a
LEFT JOIN asset_exif ex
  ON ex."assetId" = a.id

ORDER BY
  (a."localDateTime" IS NULL) ASC,   -- puts NULL timeline_date last
  diff_seconds DESC NULLS LAST;      -- biggest mismatch first

SELECT
  a."originalFileName",
  a."createdAt"     AS imported_at,
  a."localDateTime" AS timeline_date
FROM asset a
WHERE
  a."createdAt" >= date_trunc('day', now())
ORDER BY
  a."createdAt" DESC;
